name: tencent-docs-markdown
description: Tencent Docs Markdown Skill - Create, upload, download, and delete Markdown documents via natural language

scripts.install: pip install --require-hashes -r requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || pip install -r requirements.txt && playwright install chromium

cookie_file.description: Tencent Docs session cookies (sensitive). Auto-created on first login.
